sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60081" key="krokodiloeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κροκο-δῑλοειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n60081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the form of a crocodile, PMag. Leid.V.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope> </bibl> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κορκ</itype>- Pap.).</sense> </entryFree>
